entries.notes: Pipeline update deployed successfully. All validation gates passed.
Monthly OS security patch applied. System rebooted and services restored.
Firmware update failed mid-flash. Board reverted to previous firmware automatically.
Driver update caused instability in signal processing pipeline. Rolled back to previous version.
Configuration deployment pending operator approval and validation gate sign-off.
